settings.label: Formspree form ID
settings.info: Optional. Sign up at formspree.io, create a form, paste the ID here. Leave empty to use mailto: fallback.

settings.label: Enable page transition curtain
settings.info: Animated mahjong tile curtain between page navigations

settings.label: Enable gradient background
settings.info: Three.js animated gradient canvas behind content

settings.label: Enable smooth scroll (Lenis)
settings.info: Smooth scrolling on desktop. Disabled automatically on touch devices.

settings.label: Event date metafield namespace
settings.info: Namespace for the product metafield containing event date

settings.label: Event date metafield key
settings.info: Key for the product metafield containing event date

settings.label: Event venue metafield key
settings.info: Key for the product metafield containing venue name/address

settings.label: Event time metafield key
settings.info: Key for the product metafield containing event time range

settings.label: Event status metafield key
settings.info: Key for sold-out / coming-soon status. Values: sold-out, coming-soon, or empty for available.
